description: Collapsible content section with optional title, icon, and header actions. Supports two-way binding on collapsed state.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Optional icon name displayed before the title.

parameters.name: HeaderActions
parameters.description: Optional actions rendered in the header (e.g. buttons).

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true, the section can be collapsed/expanded by clicking the header.

parameters.name: Collapsed
parameters.description: Whether the section is currently collapsed. Use with CollapsedChanged for two-way binding.

examples.title: Collapsible section with icon and header actions
examples.code:
Save

Collapsible content
